pi_items.source: Cross-referenced across task.json description (line 5), setup_task.sh (line 12), export_result.sh (line 13), and verifier.py artifact checking logic

verifier.py line 53 checks 'if file_size > 10000:' which equals 9.77 KB (10,000 bytes / 1024). Metadata claims 10 KB which would be 10,240 bytes. The actual verification threshold is 240 bytes lower than claimed.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real GCompris educational software from Ubuntu repositories to launch the 'Redraw the given image' activity, confirmed as a genuine activity in GCompris's Basic Logic and Reasoning Puzzles collection. The expected output file path is /home/ga/redraw_complete.png. The file size verification uses a threshold of approximately 9.77 KB (10,000 bytes) in the verifier code, which is inconsistent with the metadata claim of 10 KB minimum (10,240 bytes).
